final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing sports illustration for a basketball slam-dunk scene.

Style/medium: needs a "热血动漫" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Slam Dunk manga illustration tradition, 1990s Weekly Shōnen Jump action spreads, Kuroko's Basketball anime key animation; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must capture the player mid-air at the dunk peak, with dynamic motion blur conveying speed and impact
Subject: must include a basketball player (one) performing a slam dunk, sweat droplets flying from the action
Scene/backdrop: must include a basketball court setting with cheering crowd and camera flashes in the background
Lighting/mood: needs high-energy, dramatic atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs intense, saturated direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the sense of tension and passion throughout the scene
Avoid:
